smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/herg/test_aggregate.py -q => 19 passed in the core env (laptop, no box/GPU). Covers harmonization shape (BayeshERG/CardioTox/ADMET-AI identity P_block, BayeshERG carries alea/epis, CardioGenAI 'hERG pIC50' through the placeholder F-1 logistic anchored at pIC50=5.0->0.5), the CToxPred2 vote-not-probability landmine, provisional flag levels, spread caution bias, and the explicit DEFERRED marker.

note: hERG gate harmonization layer built + a PROVISIONAL, owner-approved uncalibrated flag (PLACEHOLDER_* block) so the endpoint RUNS; calibrated weighting/thresholds and F-1 pIC50->P(block) mapping remain DEFERRED (needs_aaran).
